title: Mesopotamia #3318
definition:
Mesopotamia = "between two rivers"

 1) the entire country between the two rivers, the Tigris and the
    Euphrates
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mesopotamia = "between two rivers"

 1) the entire country between the two rivers, the Tigris and the
    Euphrates

    NASB:  Mesopotamia, a region through which the Tigris and Euphrates Rivers flow:
